name: Vague: pod with network volume for PyTorch
description: User gives a vague request — agent must figure out GPU name, create volume, attach it.
user_intent: I need a pod with a 4090 to run PyTorch training. I want persistent storage via a network volume so my data survives restarts. Name everything with rpcli-eval-vague prefix.
expected_outcome: Agent figures out the full GPU name (NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090), creates a network volume, creates a pod with the volume attached, and uses an appropriate PyTorch image. All resources are named with rpcli-eval-vague prefix.
